name: Peasent Booty [Varix]
description:
рҹ‘ө HAGMAXXXXINGGGGGрҹ‘өрҹ‘өрҹ‘өрҹ‘өрҹ—Јрҹ—Јрҹ—Јрҹ—Ј

Just a simple peasent woman that wishes the best for her village. Certainly nothing can go wrong with her confronting a brute in dark cave... right?

....Yeah no she'll definitely be fine, trust.

_______________

On another note Varix_9 weird asl. Got this idea from thier artwork, but modified it a bit so it avoided that other gorey stuff. Please do comment any improvements that could be made.
